title: Director Autopsy and Technique Extraction
objective: Populate the director autopsy system with at least 10 analyzed film sequences. Extract reusable technique patterns, identify framework blind spots, and feed discoveries back into the methodology.
storyQuestions: What techniques from Hitchcock, Fincher, Park Chan-wook cannot be explained by current idiom FSMs?
For each unexplained technique, is the gap in idioms, cognitive rules, or evaluation?
Can extracted techniques be parameterized (e.g. Fincher reveal = reveal idiom with INFO_DENSITY > 3)?
How many autopsy sessions before the methodology stabilizes?
baseAcceptanceChecks: 10 film sequences analyzed with full autopsy protocol
At least 5 new reusable technique patterns extracted and parameterized
Framework blind spots cataloged with proposed fixes
Technique library indexed by genre, emotion, and scene type
